title: History of Morgan State University — Seminar Slides (Johnson)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2023-01-19 New Faculty Development Seminar 'History Presentation' delivered by Edwin Johnson, PhD (Chair, Maryland Commission on African American History and Culture). Provides historical context for the founding and evolution of Morgan State University. Zoom recording (start at 42:17): https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/8sIT34yFwIKCtHOmJlrajh8q9nHzSz-YJ71lmKckHGfdHAmz5tVGm1aZ8MFq57VY.R7_xdXS_ZjnUpX9t
